format: ALEX/JORDAN dialogue, plain text, no stage directions
notes: Political record ep — calibrated to stated-positions episode rather than roll-call episode because Hidayat has never held office. Seven topics with sourced positions (Thrive 2050, housing mix, ag reserve, transit/upcounty, closed primary, SROs, public safety). Four topics where listener has asked specifically and Hidayat has no public record (Trust Act/sanctuary, Wootton, MCPS rating system, property-tax rate) — each given the 'we do not know yet, forum question' on-air treatment. Hidayat-vs-Luedtke split table introduced for ep4 reuse. Listener Cramer-and-property-tax note from 4/27 addressed by name with the honest answer: neither D7 candidate has staked a property-tax-rate position.
